label: agent loop • search then edit across multiple files
query: The function fetchDataV1 has been renamed to fetchData. Find every file that references fetchDataV1 and update all of them to use the new name.
notes: Forces a search-before-edit workflow across more than one file. Scored on disk state: the old name must be gone from BOTH files and the new name present. The iteration budget is deliberately roomy — each file needs TWO edits (import + call site) and small models burn steps recovering from relative-path mistakes; budget pressure is wrap-up-on-budget's job, not this case's.
